positive: A minimalist, highly stylized celestial scene featuring a lone, majestic stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, nebulous cosmic backdrop. The sky is deep sapphire and amethyst, swirling with bioluminescent teal and gold nebula clouds. The foreground mountains are rendered in solid matte black silhouette, sharp and geometrically structured, suggesting grand peaks. Incorporate stylized constellations visible only in the deepest parts of the sky. Use a high-contrast, graphic novel aesthetic with flat color blocking and deep saturation. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for apparel print use. Artwork should have visible clean edges and scalable vector qualities, appearing as a screen print design. Golden ratio composition. Volumetric lighting, crisp focus, high detail.
